message:
feat: add robot/human CLI commands for pane reservations

Implements wa-nu4.1.6.3 — CLI commands to create, release, and list
pane reservations through both robot and human interfaces.

Robot commands (already scaffolded, now backed by storage API):
- `wa robot reservations reserve <pane_id> --ttl --owner-kind --owner-id --reason`
- `wa robot reservations release <reservation_id>`
- `wa robot reservations list` (expires stale before listing)
- Stable JSON envelope via RobotResponse<T>
- Error code: robot.reservation_conflict for duplicate active

Human CLI commands (new):
- `wa reserve <pane_id> --ttl --owner-kind --owner-id --reason [--json]`
  Defaults: owner_kind=manual, owner_id=cli-user, ttl=1800s
  Text mode: prints summary; --json: prints RobotReservationInfo
- `wa reservations [--json]`
  Table view: ID, PANE, OWNER_KIND, OWNER_ID, REASON, EXPIRES_IN
  Expires stale reservations before listing

Data structures:
- RobotReservationInfo (id, pane_id, owner_kind, owner_id, reason,
  created_at, expires_at, released_at, status)
- RobotReserveData, RobotReleaseData, RobotReservationsListData

Tests (11 new, 69 total wa tests pass):
- JSON schema validation: RobotReservationInfo, RobotReserveData,
  RobotReleaseData, RobotReservationsListData
- skip_serializing_if for optional fields (reason, released_at)
- Empty list, multiple entries
- DB integration: create→list→release lifecycle
- Conflict detection: duplicate active reservation fails
- Expire/release round-trip
- PaneReservation→RobotReservationInfo mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
